Meeting notes 2026-04-04

Discussed the qi project roadmap.
Phase 1 through Phase 8 are planned.
The most important phases are indexing and search.

Key decisions:
- Use ncruces/go-sqlite3 for CGo-free SQLite
- Use sqlite-vec for vector search
- Use FTS5 for BM25 full-text search
- Content-addressable storage for deduplication
